name: @etzhayyim/witness-quorum
description: Deterministic witness selection + quorum accept/reject/escalate decision rule + Ed25519-signed validation-membrane attestation, over a pluggable witness transport (in-memory or PDS-polling). Relocated from etzhayyim/root:20-actors/etzhayyim-sdk/src/kotoba-datomic/ per the kotoba-lang library-placement rule (ADR-2606302300). The only complete working implementation of this logic in the kotoba-lang ecosystem as of the relocation -- its Rust and Python siblings were both deleted in an unrelated workspace purge.
